summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Task 1 — Foundation Analytics Layer (Watchlist, Lifecycle, Signals, Market Overview v2, Product Feed Intelligence). Backend: 8/9 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components and interactions working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: PRICE_DROP signal not emitted immediately after re-ingesting product with lower price
minor_bugs.impact: Signal appears to be delayed or requires specific timing conditions
minor_bugs.notes: This might be due to the 24-hour window requirement or timing between ingests. All other signals (NEW_PRODUCT, PROMO_DETECTED, TOP_SALES_DETECTED, STOCK_OUT) work correctly.

passed_tests: Backend: Root endpoint (/api/) returns correct schema and status
Backend: Watchlist CRUD - GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE all working, upsert by category_key prevents duplicates
Backend: Watchlist categories endpoint returns discovered categories from products
Backend: Ingest side-effects - NEW_PRODUCT signal emitted on first capture
Backend: Ingest side-effects - PROMO_DETECTED signal emitted when badges include 'promo'
Backend: Ingest side-effects - TOP_SALES_DETECTED signal emitted when badges include 'top_sales'
Backend: Ingest side-effects - STOCK_OUT signal emitted when availability flips True->False
Backend: Ingest side-effects - NEW_PRODUCT signal is idempotent (no duplicates on same day)
Backend: Lifecycle summary returns buckets with correct counts (new, out_of_stock, etc.)
Backend: Lifecycle feed returns products with lifecycle_status and reasons
Backend: Lifecycle feed filters by status=new correctly
Backend: Lifecycle feed respects watchlist_only parameter
Backend: Signals endpoint returns signals with filtering by kind
Backend: Signals summary returns buckets per kind with correct counts
Backend: Market overview returns all required fields (new_products, stock_outs, promo_count, price_drops, etc.)
Backend: Market heat endpoint returns hot categories (requires ≥5 events)
Backend: Seller pressure endpoint returns sellers ranked by activity
Backend: Market promo endpoint returns promo/top_sales signals
Backend: Product feed returns items with lifecycle_status, reasons, and signals array
Backend: Product feed filters by lifecycle status correctly
Backend: Product feed filters by signal_kind correctly
Backend: Backfill endpoint updates first/last_seen_at and emits missing NEW_PRODUCT signals
Backend: Regression - /api/analytics/summary still works
Backend: Regression - /api/analytics/today still works
Backend: Regression - /api/analytics/price-signals still works
Backend: Regression - /api/products still works
Backend: Regression - /api/export/products.csv still works
Frontend: Dashboard loads successfully with all KPI cards visible
Frontend: Dashboard Market Health strip (7d) visible with all 6 KPIs
Frontend: Dashboard lifecycle distribution card visible and populated
Frontend: Dashboard market heat card visible
Frontend: Dashboard seller pressure card visible
Frontend: Dashboard watchlist toggle works (switches data set)
Frontend: Watchlist page - add card with input field and button visible
Frontend: Watchlist page - can add new category via form
Frontend: Watchlist page - active categories card shows added items
Frontend: Watchlist page - discovered categories card shows available categories
Frontend: Lifecycle page - filters bar visible with all lifecycle status pills
Frontend: Lifecycle page - can click filter pills to filter products
Frontend: Lifecycle page - table renders with product rows
Frontend: Lifecycle page - Why? button opens popover with reasons list
Frontend: Lifecycle page - watchlist toggle present
Frontend: Signals page - summary card visible with signal counts
Frontend: Signals page - filter pills work for signal kinds
Frontend: Signals page - signal items rendered in list (31 signals found)
Frontend: Signals page - watchlist toggle present
Frontend: Layout - all 8 navigation links present (Огляд, Watchlist, Lifecycle, Сигнали, Товари, Динаміка, Продавці, Історія)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor issue: PRICE_DROP signal emission timing needs investigation. The signal logic appears correct in code (services/signals.py lines 138-177), but during testing the signal was not found immediately after re-ingesting with lower price. This might be a timing issue with the 24-hour window check or the signal deduplication logic. All other functionality is working correctly.
